narrative:
Springfield Twp township has 1,241 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
